framework.FrameworkDescription: ISO 45001 is an international standard for occupational health and safety management systems, providing a framework to improve employee safety, reduce workplace risks, and create better, safer working conditions.

{"6912": {"impact": "Non-compliance with the top management leadership and commitment review can lead to increased workplace accidents, regulatory fines, reputational damage, and decreased employee morale.", "comments": "Focus on reviewing the documentation of the annual review process and ensuring that responsible parties are held accountable for addressing identified issues.", "evidence": "", "re_audit": false, "criticality": "Major", "description": "Top management must conduct an annual review of the OH&S management system to assess its effectiveness. The review should include evaluating the performance of the system, identifying opportunities for improvement, and ensuring compliance with ISO 45001 requirements. Key stakeholders, including OH&S representatives", "accept_reject": "1", "how_to_verify": "1. Review the documented findings of the annual review process. 2. Verify the actions taken and responsible parties for addressing identified improvement opportunities. 3. Check if timelines for issue resolution have been met.", "re_audit_date": "", "review_status": "accept", "why_to_verify": "Verification is critical to ensure that top management is actively engaged in improving the OH&S management system and maintaining compliance with ISO 45001 requirements.", "recommendation": ["Regularly communicate the importance of the annual review to top management.", "Provide training on ISO 45001 requirements and effective review practices.", "Establish a system for tracking and monitoring progress on identified improvement opportunities."], "selected_risks": [], "what_to_verify": "1. Documentation of the annual review process. 2. Actions taken to address improvement opportunities. 3. Timelines for issue resolution.", "mitigation_date": "", "review_comments": "Reviewed", "severity_rating": 10, "underlying_cause": "Lack of top management commitment, awareness, or understanding of the importance of the annual review process and compliance with ISO 45001 requirements.", "compliance_status": "1", "details_of_finding": "Typical findings may include incomplete documentation of the annual review, lack of follow-up on identified improvement opportunities, or delays in resolving issues.", "responsible_for_plan": "Internal Audit", "selected_mitigations": [], "suggested_action_plan": ["Hold a meeting with top management to emphasize the importance of the annual review and compliance with ISO 45001 requirements.", "Provide training to top management on effective review practices and their roles in maintaining compliance.", "Establish a review schedule with clear responsibilities, deadlines, and follow-up mechanisms."]}}

{"6913": {"impact": "Non-compliance with the establishment and functioning of Health and Safety Committees can lead to increased workplace accidents, injuries, and potential fatalities. This can result in financial losses due to compensation claims, regulatory penalties for violating occupational health and safety laws, and operational disruptions from investigations and remediation efforts.", "comments": "Focus on verifying the composition of the committees, the frequency and effectiveness of meetings, and the documentation of actions taken and recommendations made.", "evidence": "", "re_audit": false, "criticality": "Major", "description": "All business units within the organization must establish Health and Safety Committees as per regulatory requirements. The committees should comprise representatives from various organizational levels and meet regularly to discuss occupational health and safety issues. Workers must be consulted and allowed to participate in the committee meetings. Incident reports, hazards, risks, and opportunities must be reported through the established mechanisms. Records of meetings, actions taken, and recom", "accept_reject": "1", "how_to_verify": "1. Review the list of committee members and their roles. 2. Examine meeting minutes for evidence of regular meetings and discussions on health and safety issues. 3. Assess incident reports, hazard assessments, and risk assessments to ensure they are reported and addressed through the committee. 4. Check for documented recommendations and actions taken as a result of committee meetings.", "re_audit_date": "", "review_status": "accept", "why_to_verify": "Verification is critical to ensure that the Health and Safety Committees are actively engaged in addressing occupational health and safety issues, promoting a safe work environment, and complying with regulatory requirements.", "recommendation": ["Regularly review and update the list of committee members to ensure representation from all organizational levels.", "Implement a structured meeting schedule for the committees to meet regularly and discuss health and safety issues.", "Establish a robust system for documenting incident reports, hazard assessments, and risk assessments discussed and addressed by the committees."], "selected_risks": [], "what_to_verify": "1. List of Health and Safety Committee members and their roles. 2. Meeting minutes documenting discussions on health and safety issues. 3. Incident reports, hazard assessments, and risk assessments reported through the committee.", "mitigation_date": "", "review_comments": "Reviewed", "severity_rating": 10, "underlying_cause": "Non-compliance with the establishment and functioning of Health and Safety Committees may occur due to lack of awareness of regulatory requirements, inadequate resources allocated to health and safety initiatives, or a lack of commitment from organizational leadership.", "compliance_status": "2", "details_of_finding": "Typical findings may include incomplete committee member lists, irregular or ineffective committee meetings, lack of documentation on incident reports and risk assessments discussed, and absence of follow-up actions on recommendations made during meetings.", "responsible_for_plan": "Internal Audit", "selected_mitigations": [], "suggested_action_plan": {"1": "Conduct a comprehensive review of the current Health and Safety Committees to ensure compliance with regulatory requirements.", "2": "Provide training to committee members on their roles and responsibilities in promoting occupational health and safety within the organization.", "3": "Implement a tracking system to monitor the effectiveness of committee meetings, actions taken, and recommendations made, with regular reporting to organizational leadership.", "4": "Establish clear communication channels for workers to raise health and safety concerns and ensure their active participation in committee meetings.", "5": "Regularly audit and update the documentation of incident reports, hazard assessments, and risk assessments discussed and addressed by the committees."}}}
